How much time did AI save?
Most issues came from slow responses and maintenance requests.
↳ Avg response time peaked at 2.1 min in Jan.
↳ They created the most escalations this month (42 + 31).
How much time did AI save?
AI saved an estimated 42 staff hours this month.
